checklist.description: All three `@acme/*` workspace packages (`@acme/ui-components`, `@acme/data-utils`, `@acme/api-client`) are moved from `dependencies` to `devDependencies` in the corrected `package.json`
checklist.name: workspace deps moved to devDeps

checklist.description: The corrected `package.json` has NO `workspace:*` entries in the `dependencies` field
checklist.name: No workspace deps in dependencies

checklist.description: The non-bundled, non-workspace dependencies (`react`, `react-dom`) remain in `dependencies` (or are moved to `peerDependencies`) — they are NOT removed entirely
checklist.name: Non-bundled deps preserved

checklist.description: `check-pack.sh` detects the presence of `workspace:` strings inside the `dependencies` field of `package.json`
checklist.name: check-pack.sh detects workspace in deps

checklist.description: `check-pack.sh` exits with a non-zero exit code when workspace deps are found in `dependencies`
checklist.name: check-pack.sh exits non-zero on violation

checklist.description: `audit-report.md` explains that pnpm publish rewrites `workspace:*` to concrete version numbers, causing E404 for internal packages that don't exist on npm
checklist.name: Audit report explains the risk

checklist.description: `audit-report.md` names all three misplaced workspace packages as the issue
checklist.name: Audit report identifies all three packages

checklist.description: `audit-report.md` or `check-pack.sh` comments mention that bundled deps should be in devDependencies because Vite inlines them — they are not needed at runtime by consumers
checklist.name: Vite bundling reason explained

context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies that bundled workspace dependencies must be in devDependencies (not dependencies) to avoid pnpm publish rewriting workspace:* to concrete npm versions that don't exist.
